title: マーベラス☆ヴィクトリー！！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm waiting for a scrimmage to start when I hear
some of the participants chatting with each other.

text_block_list.name: Racer A
text_block_list.text:
I don't know what it is... I just haven't been able
to improve my time lately.

text_block_list.name: Racer B
text_block_list.text:
Tell me about it. I'll be glad if I don't finish last
today...

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Hey there, you two. ☆ It sounds like you've lost
sight of your own marvelous spark! ★

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
But don't you worry, because it's still there—I can
see it plain as day! ☆ Let's make this race a
marvelous one! ★

text_block_list.name: Racer A
text_block_list.text: Wha—huh? What's this now?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Uh, sorry about that. I've got her from here.
Excuse us!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
What's the big idea, Marvelous? Why are you
talking up your opponents just before the race?

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
I wanted them to notice the marvelous effort
they've been putting in! ☆ Then our race will be
marvelous too! ★

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Nerves are just a foreign concept to you, huh?
Shouldn't you worry about yourself first?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I know you haven't been feeling the greatest
lately.

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
No matter my condition, I'm always marvelous! ☆
The sun might set sometimes, but the stars are
always in the sky! ★

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
So thanks, but don't worry about a thing! ☆ Just
sit back and watch my marvelous race! ★

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Finally, it's time for the race to begin. Under the
watchful eyes of the audience, the competitors
line up at the starting gate, and the race begins!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Maintaining a steady pace near the back, we
have Marvelous Sunday! It's still anybody's race at
this point—how will this play out?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Ugh. She's definitely not in her best condition. I
hope she doesn't hurt herself...

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Ahahahahaha! ☆ Time to go into marvelous
overdrive!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Marvelous Sunday rushes forward! In barely a
moment, she's taken the lead!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Take a good look, everyone! This is what it means
to be maaarvelooous! ☆★☆

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
She's fast—and only getting faster! The winning
post is in sight... and Marvelous Sunday maintains
her lead, handily claiming first place!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I can't believe you took first from so far back. I
don't know whether to be impressed or worried at
how reckless you are.

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Did you feel it, Nature? ☆ Excitement, passion,
joy—all that marvelousness has filled the air! ★

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
But it's still not enough—not by a long shot! ☆
Therefore, my marvelous running must
continue! ★

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
For it is my belief that the world can always be
more marvelous! ☆

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Uh-huh... Right...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Marvelous Sunday is approached by the two
competitors she talked to before the race. They
look excited.

text_block_list.name: Racer A
text_block_list.text:
Oh my gosh, what was that crazy dash you did
near the end? It was incredible! You made me go
all out trying to keep up!

text_block_list.name: Racer B
text_block_list.text:
How can we learn to run like you? You've gotta
teach us! Please!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text: You don't have to run like me—you've been marvelous from the start! ☆ Once you realize that, dreams, goals—everything will fall into place! ★

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Uh, I think they were looking for something more
specific. You know, like training techni—

text_block_list.name: Racer A
text_block_list.text:
I... I can feel my heart burning with passion! Is this
what it means to be marvelous?

text_block_list.name: Racer B
text_block_list.text: I can feel it too! Marvelous! Maaarvelous!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text: That's ☆ marvelous! ☆

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Haha... Ahahaha... I'll, uh, leave you youngsters
to it...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Find your own "marvelous," huh? If it'll improve
my time, I guess it can't hurt to try it out...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: ...Marvelous. ☆

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
That's the spirit, Nature! Welcome to the world of
Marvelous! ☆★☆

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: You heard that?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Marvelous Sunday is approached by the two
competitors she talked to before the race.

text_block_list.name: Racer A
text_block_list.text:
You were really fast out there. I've never seen
anyone dash like that before.

text_block_list.name: Racer B
text_block_list.text:
I had to push pretty hard to not eat your dust...
Thanks. I almost forgot what that felt like.

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Make sure you hold onto that feeling, 'cause
that's what it means to be marvelous! ☆

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
You youngsters adapt quick, huh? Not sure I can
keep up.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Still, can't say I didn't feel a little inspired by that
all-out dash.

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Really?! All right! We'll get you fired up and
feeling marvelous in no time, Nature! ☆
